'''jarungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidebehind|hidebehind]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidebehind|hidebehind]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jarungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæringith|jæringith]] || [[word:jæringij|jæringij]] || [[word:jæringish|jæringish]] || [[word:jæringi|jæringi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jarurunguth|jarurunguth]] || [[word:jarurunguj|jarurunguj]] || [[word:jarurungush|jarurungush]] || [[word:jarurungu|jarurungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jarunguth|jarunguth]] || [[word:jarunguj|jarunguj]] || [[word:jarungush|jarungush]] || [[word:jarungu|jarungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jarufnguth|jarufnguth]] || [[word:jarufnguj|jarufnguj]] || [[word:jarufngush|jarufngush]] || [[word:jarufnguf|jarufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jarunguthu|jarunguthu]] || [[word:jarunguju|jarunguju]] || [[word:jarungushu|jarungushu]] || [[word:jarunguku|jarunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jarunguth|jarunguth]] || [[word:jarunguj|jarunguj]] || [[word:jarungush|jarungush]] || [[word:jarungu|jarungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jarunguthul|jarunguthul]] || [[word:jarungujul|jarungujul]] || [[word:jarungushul|jarungushul]] || [[word:jarungukul|jarungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jarunguthuthu|jarunguthuthu]] || [[word:jarungujuju|jarungujuju]] || [[word:jarungushushu|jarungushushu]] || [[word:jarunguku|jarunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jarunguthun|jarunguthun]] || [[word:jarungujun|jarungujun]] || [[word:jarungushun|jarungushun]] || [[word:jarungukun|jarungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jarunguthuoro|jarunguthuoro]] || [[word:jarungujuoro|jarungujuoro]] || [[word:jarungushuoro|jarungushuoro]] || [[word:jarungukuoro|jarungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
